allow.reason: Framework Retry-After primitive computing a relative delay; the sanctioned ClockInterface migration for the rate-limit middleware is tracked separately.
Framework in-memory rate-limit window store; low-level clock read, ClockInterface injection tracked as a separate refactor.
TOTP time-step derivation already accepts an optional injected timestamp ($now); the fallback time() is the documented default and is exercised deterministically in tests via $now.
